raw.message:
황폐한 세상에서 살아남을 수 있을까?
아이템을 합쳐 식량과 도구를 만들고 캠프를 재건하세요.
지금 바로 생존을 시작하세요.

hook.summary: A static character portrait with survival-themed text and a glitchy visual effect.
hook.visual_action: Static 2D illustration of a girl with freckles against a wasteland background, flickering with subtle glitch effects.
hook.text_overlay: 포스트 아포칼립스 세상에서 '머지'로 살아남기, 이건 캠핑이 아니라 생존이야, MERGE SURVIVAL WASTELAND, DOWNLOAD

scene_flow: Introduction of the main character and the post-apocalyptic survival theme through a static title card.
Sustained view of the character with subtle visual flickering and ambient wind sound effects.
Persistent display of the game title and the download call to action.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers who enjoy merge puzzles and atmospheric survival narratives.
